% Standalone compile wrapper for Figure 2 (evidence chain).
% The session container has no LaTeX; build this on the cluster or locally:
%     pdflatex fig2_standalone.tex     (run from repo root, or adjust \input path)
% Produces fig2_standalone.pdf for visual QA. The body is machine-generated by
%     python experiments/paper/plot_evidence_chain.py --tikz
% and is dropped into the paper via \input{figures/fig6_evidence_chain_generated}.
\documentclass[border=6pt]{standalone}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{pgfplots}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.17}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\begin{document}
\input{../../figures/fig6_evidence_chain_generated}
\end{document}
